center.name: 悉尼
center.summary: 悉尼是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括叢塚雉、小凤头鹦鹉、Australian king parrot等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Further from their normal eastern upland habitat, they are also found in Canberra during winter, the outer western and northern suburbs of Sydney, and the Carnarvon Gorge in central Queensland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the south, it is common in both mountain and lowland regions. Brushturkeys are now common in urban environments and can be found in backyards in both Brisbane and Sydney. The range of the Australian brushturkey extends from the top of Cape York to approximately the area around Wollongong

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Little corellas can also be found in urban areas, including Melbourne, Canberra, Sydney and Brisbane, where they feed on lawns and playing fields

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Varied trillers prefer warm, reasonably moist environments and are found in New Guinea and the Bismarck Archipelago, along much of the tropical and sub-tropical coastal hinterland of eastern Australia, from about the Sydney area to the tip of Cape York Peninsula, in the moister part of the Kimberley, and throughout the Top End
